question: top products by revenue
sql: SELECT p.product_name, p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.product_name, p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: revenue by region
sql: SELECT o.region, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY o.region ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: top selling products last quarter
sql: SELECT p.product_name, p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') AND o.created_at >= '2026-04-01' AND o.created_at < '2026-07-01' GROUP BY p.product_name, p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

question: average order value
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(o.total_amount), 2) as average_order_value FROM jd_sports.orders o WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: customer count by region
sql: SELECT u.state, COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) as customer_count FROM jd_sports.users u GROUP BY u.state ORDER BY customer_count DESC

question: return rate by channel
sql: SELECT o.channel, ROUND(COUNTIF(oi.returned = true) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as return_rate_pct FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY o.channel

question: products low on stock at Glasgow
sql: SELECT p.product_name, i.stock_level, i.reorder_point FROM jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id WHERE i.distribution_center = 'Glasgow' AND i.stock_level <= i.reorder_point

question: age group distribution of customers
sql: SELECT u.age_group, COUNT(*) as customer_count FROM jd_sports.users u GROUP BY u.age_group ORDER BY customer_count DESC

question: average discount by product category
sql: SELECT p.category, ROUND(AVG(oi.discount_pct), 2) as avg_discount_pct FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY avg_discount_pct DESC

question: orders by sales channel
sql: SELECT o.channel, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM jd_sports.orders o GROUP BY o.channel ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: monthly revenue trend
sql: SELECT FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m', o.created_at) as month, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

question: brand revenue breakdown
sql: SELECT p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: conversion funnel from page views to purchases
sql: SELECT e.event_type, COUNT(*) as event_count FROM jd_sports.events e GROUP BY e.event_type ORDER BY event_count DESC

question: traffic source that drives most purchases
sql: SELECT e.traffic_source, COUNT(*) as purchase_count FROM jd_sports.events e WHERE e.event_type = 'purchase' GROUP BY e.traffic_source ORDER BY purchase_count DESC

question: revenue by brand and category
sql: SELECT p.brand, p.category, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.brand, p.category ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: total orders and revenue summary
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) as total_orders, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as total_revenue, ROUND(AVG(o.total_amount), 2) as avg_order_value FROM jd_sports.orders o JOIN jd_sports.order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped')

question: products running category
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.brand, p.rrp FROM jd_sports.products p WHERE p.category = 'Running' ORDER BY p.rrp DESC

question: loyalty tier breakdown of customers
sql: SELECT u.loyalty_tier, COUNT(*) as customer_count FROM jd_sports.users u GROUP BY u.loyalty_tier ORDER BY customer_count DESC

question: inventory by distribution center
sql: SELECT i.distribution_center, p.category, SUM(i.stock_level) as total_stock FROM jd_sports.inventory_items i JOIN jd_sports.products p ON i.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY i.distribution_center, p.category ORDER BY total_stock DESC

question: orders by status
sql: SELECT o.status, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM jd_sports.orders o GROUP BY o.status ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: new user signups by traffic source
sql: SELECT u.traffic_source, COUNT(*) as signup_count FROM jd_sports.users u GROUP BY u.traffic_source ORDER BY signup_count DESC

question: top 10 skus by revenue
sql: SELECT p.product_name, p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price * oi.quantity), 2) as revenue, SUM(oi.quantity) as units_sold FROM jd_sports.order_items oi JOIN jd_sports.products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN jd_sports.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.status IN ('delivered', 'shipped') GROUP BY p.product_name, p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
